name: smalltv-upload-firmware
description: Upload a .bin or .bin.gz firmware file to the SmallTV device via /update. DANGEROUS: flashing bad firmware can brick the device. Always ask the user to confirm before calling. The confirm parameter must be set to true.

device_ip.description: Optional device IP. Falls back to SMALLTV_DEVICE_IP.

file_path.description: Absolute path to a local .bin or .bin.gz firmware file

confirm.description: Must be true. Set only after the user has explicitly approved the firmware flash.
